2606.24388.title: PHANTOM: A Large-Scale Dataset of Multimodal Adversarial Attacks for Vision-Language Models
2606.24388.paper_summary: We introduce a large-scale, open-source dataset of pre-generated adversarial attacks for vision-language models (VLMs). The dataset is designed to be diverse, representative, and practical, extending existing benchmarks by covering 10 high-level categories and 55 subcategories of harmful intents. Our primary goal is to make adversarial data accessible to the research community, given the computational cost and complexity of generating large numbers of attacks. The dataset comprises 47 524 adversarial samples, generated using state-of-the-art attack strategies from recent literature. Our work complements existing efforts by consolidating and extending prior benchmarks from multiple established sources, resulting in 7 826 intents, and introduce an additional category to broaden coverage. This provides realistic evaluation resources for studying model robustness and alignment. Our dataset intends to enable researchers and practitioners to systematically evaluate the robustness and safety of VLMs, fine-tune attack-generation models, and develop or stress-test defensive guardrails under diverse adversarial conditions. By releasing this resource, we aim to lower the barrier to adversarial research and foster more reproducible, comprehensive, and comparable evaluations of VLM safety.
2606.24388.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了一個大規模的開源數據集，該數據集包含了為視覺-語言模型（VLMs）預生成的對抗攻擊。<lb/>這個數據集旨在多樣化、具代表性且實用，通過涵蓋10個高層次類別和55個有害意圖的子類別來擴展現有基準。<lb/>我們的主要目標是使對抗數據對研究社群可及，考慮到生成大量攻擊的計算成本和複雜性。<lb/>該數據集包含47,524個對抗樣本，這些樣本是使用近期文獻中的最先進攻擊策略生成的。<lb/>我們的工作通過整合和擴展來自多個已建立來源的先前基準，補充了現有的努力，最終形成了7,826個意圖，並引入了一個額外的類別以擴大覆蓋範圍。<lb/>這為研究模型的穩健性和對齊性提供了現實的評估資源。<lb/>我們的數據集旨在使研究人員和實踐者能夠系統地評估VLM的穩健性和安全性，微調攻擊生成模型，並在多樣的對抗條件下開發或壓力測試防禦措施。<lb/>通過釋放這一資源，我們旨在降低對抗研究的門檻，促進對VLM安全性進行更可重複、全面和可比較的評估。
2606.24388.author: Simone Gallivanone et.al.
2606.24388.authors: Simone Gallivanone, Hossein Khodadadi, Mauro Dore, Mauro Medda, Nicola Franco
